assumptions.execution_mode: python -m freqtrade preferred over direct executable

workflow_rules: Always call get_workflow_rules() before starting any task
Always call read_rule('guidelines.md') before editing service or model files
Always call run_tests() after any code change
Always call read_logs() when app crashes or behaves unexpectedly
Save new decisions as assumptions via save_fact('assumptions', key, value)
Never import UI code from service layer
Never use string concatenation for paths — always pathlib.Path
